sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67701" key="mikre/mporos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρ-έμπορος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n67701.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pedlar, huckster</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:111:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:322b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">322b</biblScope></bibl>,</sense> </entryFree>
